Gucci 24/Wave Series Wavy Wedge Velcro Dad Sneakers

- Original imported cowhide leather upper  
- Soft imported lambskin lining  
- EVA foam outsole for lightweight comfort  
- Heel height: 6.3cm; front sole: 5cm  
- Features innovative stitching for fluid, water-like texture  
- 3D interlocking leather appliqués with Gucci metal lettering  
- Sizes: Women 35-41 (No returns/exchanges for sizes 40-41)
